title: hypolepis paupercula
intro: Hypolepis paupercula, also known as the Poor Fern or Rough Fern, is a species of fern in the family Hypolepidaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Hypolepis paupercula include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea form or as a decoction, with the leaves and stems being the primary components used for medicinal purposes.
